title: Yen-Chi Chen
text: Home * People * Yen-Chi Chen Yen-Chi Chen [1] Yen-Chi Chen , a Taiwanese computer scientist affiliated with the National Taiwan Normal University . His research interests include machine learning and computer games . He is author and co-author of Chinese Dark Chess , Surakarta , Outer-Open Gomoku , Othello and Nonogram playing and solving programs, participating and winning at ICGA and TAAI tournaments. Contents 1 Exact-Win-MCTS 2 Selected Publications 2.1 2017 ... 2.2 2020 ... 3 External Links 4 References Exact-Win-MCTS [ edit ] Along with Shun-Shii Lin and Chih-Hung Chen , Yen-Chi Chen elaborated on an exact-win strategy for overcoming AlphaZero in a Monte-Carlo Tree Search , that makes use of sub-tree's information (WIN, LOSS, DRAW, and UNKNOWN) to prune unneeded moves to increase the opportunities of discovering the critical moves [2] .
